name: crop-advisory-system
description: AI-Based Crop Advisory & Farm Management System

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix crop-advisory-backend/crop-advisory/server" "npm run dev --prefix crop-frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173"
scripts.e2e: concurrently --kill-others --success first "npm run dev --prefix crop-advisory-backend/crop-advisory/server" "npm run dev --prefix crop-frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:5000 && python e2e-tests/e2e_test_runner.py"
scripts.candidate-e2e: concurrently --kill-others --success first "npm run dev --prefix crop-advisory-backend/crop-advisory/server" "npm run dev --prefix crop-frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:5000 && mocha e2e-tests/e2e_test_runner.js --timeout 600000"
